summary: Iteration 14: All 3 new features verified - Sukanya Samriddhi PIB URL, Paperclip PDF upload, New Chat reset. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 11 features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/upload-pdf accepts PDF file and returns success with pdf_id, pdf_url, filename, size ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/upload-pdf rejects non-PDF files with 400 error ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/upload-pdf rejects files with wrong extension (.jpg) ✓
BACKEND: After /api/chat/reset, profiler asks name again (first question) ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/chat/reset requires user_id (returns 400 without it) ✓
BACKEND: GET /api/schemes returns Sukanya Samriddhi with PIB URL (static.pib.gov.in, not india.gov.in) ✓
BACKEND: Uploaded PDF can be downloaded via /api/pdf/{id} ✓
FRONTEND: Paperclip button visible in chat input bar (data-testid='chat-attach-btn') ✓
FRONTEND: New Chat button visible in header (data-testid='new-chat-btn') ✓
FRONTEND: Clicking New Chat clears messages (2 → 0) and shows toast 'नई चैट शुरू हो गई!' ✓
FRONTEND: After New Chat reset, profiler asks name again (आपका नाम क्या है?) ✓
FRONTEND: Paperclip opens file picker that accepts only PDF (accept='.pdf') ✓
FRONTEND: WhatsApp share button uses web.whatsapp.com/send URL (not wa.me) ✓
FRONTEND: PDF download button uses fetch+blob approach (not target=_blank) ✓
FRONTEND: Chat input, Mic button, Send button all present with data-testid ✓
FRONTEND: App Header displays correctly with New Chat button ✓
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for new features
Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana URL correctly updated to static.pib.gov.in/WriteReadData/specificdocs/documents/2026/jan/doc2026121762801.pdf
PDF upload validates file extension (.pdf) and file size (10MB limit)
Chat reset clears both chat history (ChatLog) and user profile
WhatsApp share uses web.whatsapp.com/send (not wa.me which gets blocked)
PDF download uses fetch+blob for direct download (not window.open which opens in new tab)
seed_data_creation: Tests use timestamp-based phone numbers to create fresh users each run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified 3 new features: (1) Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana PDF URL updated to static.pib.gov.in (not india.gov.in), (2) Paperclip PDF upload button with data-testid='chat-attach-btn' accepting only .pdf files, (3) New Chat button with data-testid='new-chat-btn' that clears messages and resets profiler. WhatsApp share uses web.whatsapp.com/send. PDF download uses fetch+blob approach.
